Title: Successful Profile Creation with Valid Data
Preconditions: User has installed SmartSave and opened the application for the first time.
Test Data: First name = "John", Last name = "Doe", Email = "john.doe@example.com", Password = "SecurePass123", Confirm Password = "SecurePass123"
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Create Profile" button.
2. Enter first name "John" in the First Name field.
3. Enter last name "Doe" in the Last Name field.
4. Enter email "john.doe@example.com" in the Email field.
5. Enter password "SecurePass123" in the Password field.
6. Re-enter password "SecurePass123" in the Confirm Password field.
7. Tap on "Register" button.
Expected Result: Profile is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the home screen with a confirmation message "Profile created successfully."

Title: Profile Creation with Invalid Email Format
Preconditions: User has installed SmartSave and opened the application for the first time.
Test Data: First name = "John", Last name = "Doe", Email = "johndoeexample.com", Password = "SecurePass123", Confirm Password = "SecurePass123"
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Create Profile" button.
2. Enter first name "John" in the First Name field.
3. Enter last name "Doe" in the Last Name field.
4. Enter email "johndoeexample.com" in the Email field.
5. Enter password "SecurePass123" in the Password field.
6. Re-enter password "SecurePass123" in the Confirm Password field.
7. Tap on "Register" button.
Expected Result: Error message "Invalid email format" is displayed, and the user remains on the registration screen.

Title: Profile Creation with Mismatched Passwords
Preconditions: User has installed SmartSave and opened the application for the first time.
Test Data: First name = "John", Last name = "Doe", Email = "john.doe@example.com", Password = "SecurePass123", Confirm Password = "DifferentPass123"
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Create Profile" button.
2. Enter first name "John" in the First Name field.
3. Enter last name "Doe" in the Last Name field.
4. Enter email "john.doe@example.com" in the Email field.
5. Enter password "SecurePass123" in the Password field.
6. Re-enter password "DifferentPass123" in the Confirm Password field.
7. Tap on "Register" button.
Expected Result: Error message "Passwords do not match" is displayed, and the user remains on the registration screen.

Title: Successful Consumption Calculation Submission
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a created profile.
Test Data: Electricity consumption = "150 kWh", Water consumption = "200 liters", Waste production = "30 kg"
Test Steps:
1. Tap on "Calculate Consumption" button.
2. Enter electricity consumption "150 kWh" in the respective field.
3. Enter water consumption "200 liters" in the respective field.
4. Enter waste production "30 kg" in the respective field.
5. Tap on "Submit" button.
Expected Result: Calculation is processed successfully, and a summary of the consumption indices is displayed with a suggestion for improvement.

Title: Create new user profile with valid data
Preconditions: Application installed on the phone, first launch triggered
Test Data: Username: "testuser", Name: "Test User", Date of Birth: "1990-01-01", Gender: "Male", Place of Birth: "Rome", Email: "test@example.com"
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time.
2. Fill in the registration form with the provided test data.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Profile is created and saved in the database.

Title: Overwrite existing data with confirmation
Preconditions: Application installed on the phone, existing profile data present
Test Data: Username: "newuser", Name: "New User", Date of Birth: "1985-05-15", Gender: "Female", Place of Birth: "Milan", Email: "new@example.com"
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application and detect existing data.
2. Confirm the prompt to overwrite old data.
3. Fill in the registration form with the provided test data.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Old data is deleted, new profile is created and saved.

Title: Edit existing profile data
Preconditions: Application installed, profile created
Test Steps:
1. Press the "modifica utente" (edit user) button.
2. Modify the name and email fields with the provided test data.
3. Save changes.
Expected Result: Profile is updated in the database with the new data.

Title: Add new data for consumption calculation
Preconditions: Access to calculation page
Test Data: Consumption values for a new period (e.g., "kWh: 150", "Date: 2024-05-01")
Test Steps:
1. Press the "Aggiungi Dati" (Add Data) button.
2. Enter the test data for the new period.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Consumption is calculated with the new data, and the historical data is updated.

Title: Modify past report data
Preconditions: At least one report inserted
Test Data: Corrected consumption value for a past period (e.g., "kWh: 120")
Test Steps:
1. Press the "modifica storico" (edit history) button.
2. Select a past report.
3. Modify the consumption value with the test data.
4. Save changes.
Expected Result: Historical data is updated with the corrected values.

Title: Create User Profile
Preconditions: User is on the application login/registration page.
Test Data: Valid personal data (name, email, optional fields).
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on "Create Profile" or "Sign Up" button.
2. User fills in required fields (name, email) and optional fields.
3. User clicks "Submit" or "Create Profile."
Expected Result: Profile is created successfully, and the user is redirected to the home page with a personalized greeting.

Title: Modify User Profile
Preconditions: User has an existing profile and is logged in.
Test Data: Updated personal data (e.g., new email, phone number).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to "Profile Settings" or "Edit Profile."
2. User modifies one or more fields (e.g., email, phone).
3. User clicks "Save" or "Update Profile."
Expected Result: Profile is updated with new data, and changes are reflected across the application (e.g., notifications use the new email).

Title: Generate Consumption Report
Preconditions: User is logged in and has entered at least one set of consumption data.
Test Data: Valid consumption data (e.g., energy, water usage).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Calcolo" (Calculation) page.
2. User submits consumption data (if not auto-populated).
3. User clicks "Generate Report" or equivalent.
Expected Result: Report is generated and displayed with calculated metrics (e.g., sustainability score, consumption trends).

Title: Add New Consumption Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the data input page.
Test Data: Valid consumption values (e.g., 50 kWh for energy).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Aggiunta Dati" (Add Data) page.
2. User enters consumption values for one or more categories.
3. User clicks "Submit" or "Save."
Expected Result: Data is saved, "Punti Green" are awarded, and a confirmation message appears.

Title: Receive Sustainability Notifications
Preconditions: User has generated at least one report and has enabled notifications.
Test Steps:
1. User completes a report or achieves a sustainability milestone.
2. System processes data and triggers a notification.
Expected Result: Notification appears in the app (e.g., "You improved your sustainability score by 10%!") and optionally via email/push.

Title: View Historical Reports
Preconditions: User has generated multiple reports and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Visualizzazione Storico" (History View) page.
2. User selects a time range (e.g., last 6 months) or views all reports.
Expected Result: Page displays a list/graph of past reports with metrics (e.g., consumption trends, "Punti Green" earned over time).

Title: Modify Erroneous Report
Preconditions: User has generated a report and is logged in.
Test Data: Incorrect consumption data (e.g., 100 kWh instead of 50 kWh).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Modifica storico" (Edit History) page.
2. User selects the erroneous report.
3. User corrects the data and clicks "Save."
Expected Result: Report is updated, and the correction is reflected in subsequent reports and "Punti Green" calculations.

Title: Delete Report and Associated Points
Preconditions: User has generated at least one report and is logged in.
Test Data: A report with associated "Punti Green" (e.g., 20 points).
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the report list or history page.
2. User selects the report to delete.
3. User confirms deletion (e.g., clicks "Delete" and "Confirm").
Expected Result: Report is permanently removed, and the associated "Punti Green" are deducted from the user’s total.

Title: View Sustainability Dashboard
Preconditions: User has generated at least one report and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Home" page.
2. User views the visual dashboard (e.g., progress bars, graphs).
Expected Result: Dashboard displays the user’s sustainability progress, trends, and a visual representation of their "Punti Green" relative to goals.

Title: Redeem Punti Green for Bonus
Preconditions: User has accumulated "Punti Green" (e.g., 50+ points) and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Game" or "Bonus" page.
2. User selects a reward (e.g., badge, discount) requiring 50 points.
3. User clicks "Redeem."
Expected Result: Points are deducted, and the reward is unlocked/unlocked (e.g., badge added to profile, confirmation message).

Title: Complete Sustainability Objectives
Preconditions: User has generated multiple reports and is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User views the "Obiettivi" (Objectives) page.
2. User completes an objective (e.g., "Reduce energy by 15% this month").
Expected Result: Objective is marked as completed, and additional "Punti Green" are awarded to the user’s total.

Title: Verify correct installation of the application
Preconditions: Android device with Android 7 or higher, internet connection
Test Steps:
1. Download the application APK file from the official source.
2. Initiate the installation process on an Android device with Android 7 or higher.
3. Wait for the installation to complete.
Expected Result: The application is installed correctly without errors.

Title: Verify data deletion upon app uninstallation
Preconditions: Application installed and used to generate data
Test Steps:
1. Use the application to generate and store data (e.g., create reports).
2. Uninstall the application from the device.
Expected Result: All user-generated data is permanently deleted from the device.

Title: Verify secure storage of sensitive data
Preconditions: Application installed, user account created with password
Test Steps:
1. Register a new user account in the application and set a password.
2. Attempt to retrieve or view the stored password directly from the database.
Expected Result: The password is stored securely using hashing or encryption and cannot be retrieved in plain text.

Title: Verify database backup functionality
Preconditions: Application installed, user data stored in the database
Test Steps:
1. Store sample user data in the application.
2. Trigger a manual or automatic backup process (if applicable).
Expected Result: A backup of the database is created and stored securely.

Title: Verify compatibility with Android 7+
Preconditions: Multiple Android devices with Android 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on devices running Android 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, and 12.
2. Perform basic operations (e.g., login, create a report).
Expected Result: The application installs and runs without errors on all tested Android versions.

Title: Verify fast response to user requests
Preconditions: Application installed, stable internet connection
Test Data: User actions (e.g., button clicks, data entry)
Test Steps:
1. Perform a series of actions (e.g., navigate menus, submit a form).
2. Measure the time taken for the application to respond to each action.
Expected Result: The application responds to user requests within an acceptable time frame (e.g., <2 seconds for standard actions).

Title: Verify minimal installation space requirement
Preconditions: Android device with limited storage (e.g., 500MB free)
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to install the application on a device with minimal free storage.
Expected Result: The application installs successfully without requiring excessive storage space (e.g., <50MB).

Title: Verify user-friendly interface
Preconditions: Application installed
Test Steps:
1. Navigate through the application’s main screens and features.
2. Assess the clarity and intuitiveness of buttons, menus, and instructions.
Expected Result: The interface is intuitive, with clear labels and easy navigation for all actions.

Title: Verify presence of usage instructions
Preconditions: Application installed
Test Steps:
1. Open the application and look for help sections or instructions.
2. Attempt to create a new report and follow any provided guidance.
Expected Result: Instructions for using the application and inserting data are clearly visible and easy to follow.

Title: Verify accessibility for users with disabilities
Preconditions: Application installed, device with accessibility settings enabled (e.g., screen reader, high contrast)
Test Steps:
1. Enable accessibility features on the device (e.g., screen reader, talkback).
2. Navigate through the application using these features.
Expected Result: The application is fully usable with standard accessibility tools, allowing users with disabilities to interact without issues.

Title: Verify successful application installation
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Download the application from the official source.
2. Install the application on an Android device with Android 7 or higher.
3. Open the application.
Expected Result: The application launches without errors and displays the initial screen (login or profile creation).

Title: Verify application uninstallation
Preconditions: Application is installed on the device
Test Steps:
1. Open device settings.
2. Navigate to the application list.
3. Select the application and choose the uninstall option.
Expected Result: The application is removed from the device without errors.

Title: Verify stable internet connection requirement
Preconditions: Application is installed
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Attempt to perform any action requiring database access (e.g., login, report submission).
Expected Result: The application displays an error message if no stable internet connection is available.

Title: Verify secure data transmission
Preconditions: Application is installed and logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the report submission page.
2. Fill in the report form with sample data.
3. Submit the report.
Expected Result: The data is transmitted securely (encrypted) to the database without interception or unauthorized access.

Title: Verify new profile creation
Preconditions: Application is installed
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application for the first time.
2. Click the "Create New Profile" button.
3. Fill in the required fields with valid data.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: A success message is displayed, and a new record is created in the database.

Title: Verify profile modification
Preconditions: User has a registered profile and is logged in
Test Data: Updated user information (e.g., new email, name)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile modification page.
2. Click the "Modify Profile" button.
3. Update one or more fields with new data.
4. Submit the changes.
Expected Result: The profile is updated on-screen, and the database record is modified accordingly.

Title: Verify report submission page access
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the main screen.
2. Click the "Pagina Calcolo" (Calculation Page) button.
Expected Result: The report submission form is displayed correctly.

Title: Verify successful report submission
Preconditions: User is on the report submission page
Test Data: Valid report data (all required fields filled)
Test Steps:
1. Fill in all required fields of the report form with valid data.
2. Submit the report.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the main screen, a sustainability score is assigned, and the report is stored in the database.

Title: Verify sustainability progress notifications
Preconditions: User has submitted at least one report
Test Steps: 1. Wait for the system to process the submitted report(s).
Expected Result: The user receives a notification regarding their sustainability progress.

Title: Verify access to report history
Preconditions: User has submitted at least one report
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the "Accesso Storico" (History Access) page.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to a page displaying their report history.

Title: Verify report modification from history
Preconditions: User has submitted at least one report and is on the history page
Test Steps:
1. Select a report from the history list.
2. Modify one or more fields of the report.
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The report data is updated correctly in the history and the database.

Title: Delete a User-Inserted Report
Preconditions: User has compiled at least one report in the application.
Test Data: A previously created report with associated green points and calculations.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the list of user-inserted reports.
2. Select the report to be deleted.
3. Confirm deletion via a prompt or button.
Expected Result: The selected report is permanently deleted from the system, and any associated green points and calculations are removed or updated accordingly.

Title: Display User Sustainability Progress
Preconditions: User has compiled at least one report in the application.
Test Data: Multiple reports with varying sustainability metrics.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "grafici" (graphics) page.
Expected Result: The application displays visual graphs and suggestions based on the calculations derived from the user’s reports.

Title: Access Green Points Page
Preconditions: User has compiled at least one report in the application.
Test Steps: 1. Click on the "gioco" (game) page.
Expected Result: The application displays the user’s accumulated green points, which can be used for rewards or trophies.

Title: Display Available Bonuses Based on Green Points
Preconditions: User has compiled at least one report in the application and has accumulated green points.
Test Data: User with 50 green points (or any predefined threshold).
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to the bonus section or trigger the bonus display functionality.
Expected Result: The application shows all available bonuses the user can claim based on their accumulated green points.
